global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with promotional text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Order fast food with free delivery over $15.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas, providing a bright and cheerful base.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'FreshDash' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top center.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: An abstract decorative element that adds visual interest, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15 €9.99 Order now', centrally positioned for emphasis.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15 €9.99 Order now

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in a clear, inviting font, located at the bottom center.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and cheerful, FreshDash logo, SALE badge, promotional text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the SALE badge is at the top right, the promotional text is centered, and the CTA button is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: FreshDash, SALE, Fast food, fast, Free delivery over $15, €9.99, Order now
